title: Myofibroblast-driven fibrosis in systemic sclerosis skin
abstract: We show that activated fibroblasts and collagen deposition drive dermal fibrosis in systemic sclerosis (scleroderma).

title: cGAS-STING cytosolic DNA sensing and type I interferon
abstract: Cytosolic DNA activates cGAS-STING and induces a type I interferon response in autoimmune disease.

title: A cosmetic surgery review of facial scars
abstract: This unrelated paper reviews scar revision techniques after cosmetic facial surgery.

title: Endothelial injury and vasculopathy in scleroderma
abstract: Microvascular damage and endothelial dysfunction characterize systemic sclerosis vasculopathy.

title: Chromosomal instability and aneuploidy in cancer
abstract: Chromosomal instability promotes aneuploidy and genomic instability, activating inflammatory signaling.

title: Weather patterns over the Atlantic ocean
abstract: A meteorology study unrelated to biomedicine, about ocean weather and rainfall.
